title: [BUG] Excel file lost shape after download by Exceljs
author: dinhhai96-vn
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report
Lib version: 4.3.0

## Steps To Reproduce

First, I created a workbook by downloading a template, inside there were Shapes to overwrite the data. But after being downloaded, the Shapes disappear but the data on the Cell remains.
I don't know if ExcelJs supports data processing on Shapes or not?
```javascript
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/57510449/175497322-a01243c1-be07-432d-9b02-55beed525301.png)

Before: 
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/57510449/175497557-7a9dd1ea-1c31-458c-b2e7-c0a39e3f005f.png)
After:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/57510449/175497649-9ddb69e8-596a-4b07-8700-3d565c523255.png)

comments.author: dongphongtieungao
comments.body: now, i also have the same problem

comments.author: EUGinsane
comments.body: same question, do we support shapes?
